as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inner_b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1565C0;" value="B: {1,x} {3,y}" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1B5E20;" value="→ {1,a,1,x}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="120" x="20" y="185" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontColor=#E65100;rounded=1;" value="<b>LEFT JOIN</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="140" x="180" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1565C0;" value="A 全部保留→" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="110" x="180" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_unmatch" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=9;fontColor=#B71C1C;" value="{2,b} 匹配不上" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=9;fontColor=#E65100;" value="→ {1,a,1,x}<br>→ {2,b,NULL,NULL}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="130" x="180" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontColor=#4A148C;rounded=1;" value="<b>RIGHT JOIN</b> = 换位 LEFT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="200" x="350" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=9;fontColor=#4A148C;" value="A RIGHT JOIN B<br>= B LEFT JOIN A<br>很少用，直接写成 LEFT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="370" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="warning" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#E64A19;fontSize=11;fontColor=#BF360C;rounded=1;" value="<b>⚠ LEFT JOIN 锁死驱动表</b> — 如果不需要保留左表不匹配行，改用 INNER JOIN 让优化器自由选驱动表" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="540" x="40" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
A RIGHT JOIN B
= B LEFT JOIN A
很少用，直接写成 LEFT
